title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT LAND COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
1077/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl District Land Committee chu Addl. DC Pu K. Zorammuana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.He hunah hian Lungvara 2nd IR Batallion ramah Khawzawl SP Bungalow leh Lungvara 2nd IR Batallion firing range sakna tur chu pawm tlan a ni a. Hengte bakah hian mimal in sakna tura House Pass dilna leh huan siamten Periodic patta pass renewal dilna engemaw zat sawiho a ni bawk a. Periodic patta hi neitu channa a ni lova, sawrkar ram hawhna mai a ni a, hralh chhawn phal a ni lo tih inhriattir thar leh a ni.Vawiin thutkhawmah hian SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria, DFO Pu Lalnunthanga, PHE SDO Er. Freddy Vanlalmuanawma, DIPRO Pi Lalchungnungi Lakher leh Village Council hotute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT LEVEL GOVERNMENT LAND AUTHORITY THUKHAWM
content:
1076/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th June, 2026 : Vawiin khan District Level Government Land Authority chu Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.

He thutkhawmah hian Govt Khawzawl High School ram hmawr chu Fire and Emergency Station leh quarter sak nan rem tih a ni a. Excise and Narcotics Department ram dil chu an ram mamawh zau zawngte an thehluh hnuah a hmun tur enho leh ni se tia rel a ni.

DLGLA Committee-ah hian member thahnem tak a ni.

Attachment

title: RD&A Minister Prof.Lalnilawma hovin thingtlang tihhmasawnna tur ngaihtuah
content:
1075/2026-2027

19th June, 2026:Rural Development and Administration Department changtu Minister Prof.Lalnilawma hovin vawiin khan a pisaah 16th Finance Commission sum hmang a Village Council ten thingtlang tihhmasawnna tur (16th Finance Commission Grand to Rural Local Bodies in Mizoram) kalpui dan tur chungchangah ruahmanna an siam a, inrawnkhawmna hun an hmang.

Minister chuan 15th Finance Commission sum luangral (lapse) lova kan hai chhuak thei vek hi a lawmawm a, hei hi Pathian malsawmna leh thawhhona tha vang a ni, a ti. 15th Finance Commission sum hai chhuak tura theih tawp chhuahtu kan Sawrkar official te hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. 16th Finance Commission sum pawh a hun taka hai chhuak thei turin tun atangin inbuatsaih that a pawimawh a, chumi atan chuan thawh hona tha, thahnemngaihna leh inpekna a pawimawh a ni, Prof Lalnilawma chuan a ti. Thawh hona tha kan neih chuan engmah hi huphurhawm a awm lo tih sawiin nasa zawka inpekna thar nei turin thawktute a chah a. Anmahni mawhphurhna leh buaipui lam apiangah theihtawp an chhuah ang a, harsatna an tawk a nih pawhin inhrilh hre zung zung tura fuihin, a sut kian dan an zawn zel tur thu a sawi a ni.

He meeting-ah hian Rural Development & Administration Department, Finance Department, LAD Directorate, PHE Dept, Directorate of Local Fund Audit& Pension, Social Audit Unit Official te leh All Mizoram Village Council Association hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT ROAD SAFETY COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
1074/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th June, 2026 :Nimin khan Khawzawl District Road Safety Committee chu Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.He thutkhawmah hian agenda hrang hrang nagihtuahho a ni a. Khawzawl district chhungah kawng lakah accident a awmin e-DAR portal-ah upload nghal zel a nih thu tarlan a ni a. Road accident chungchang stakeholder-te karah awlsam zawk leh a hun taka inhriattir theihna tur ruahman ni se tih a ni bawk.Committee chuan district chhung hmun hrang hranga vantlang kawngpui nekchep chungchang pawh an sawiho a. Member-te chuan hetianga kawng nekchepna hian lirthei leh veivakte chet velna a tihbuai a, thuneitute chu endik turin leh kawng nekcheptute chungah dan angin hma lak ni se tia rel a ni.

Attachment

title: PAYMENT OF DEARNESS ALLOWANCE TO THE STATE GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES AT REVISED RATES EFFECTIVE FROM 01.01.2026
